  "findings": [
    "Drywall screw spacing exceeds the maximum limits specified by GA-216 and the IRC."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install additional drywall screws to meet the maximum spacing requirements before taping and finishing."
  ],
  "rationale": "The observed field condition indicates that the screw spacing exceeds the maximum limits allowed by GA-216 and the IRC (typically 12 inches on center for ceilings and 16 inches on center for walls, depending on framing spacing and application). Because the fastening is non-compliant, the work fails inspection at the rough-complete stage and must be corrected before finishing begins.",
  "references": [
    "GA-216 Section 4.8",
    "IRC Table R702.3.5"
  ]
